allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('src/components/ui/index.jsx','utf8'\); console.log\('Lines:', code.split\('\\n'\).length, '| SearchableSelect exported:', code.includes\('export function SearchableSelect'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='instructors' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT unnest\(enum_range\(NULL::user_role\)\) AS role\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\('roles:', r.rows.map\(x=>x.role\).join\(', '\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ pool.query\(\\"SELECT unnest\(enum_range\(NULL::role_enum\)\) AS role\\"\).then\(r2=>{ console.log\('roles:', r2.rows.map\(x=>x.role\).join\(', '\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e2=>{ console.error\(e.message, e2.message\); pool.end\(\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT u.id, u.email, u.role, u.status, i.doctor_number FROM users u JOIN instructors i ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE u.role = 'professor' LIMIT 5\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='office_hours' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ if\(r.rows.length===0\) { console.log\('TABLE DOES NOT EXIST'\); } else { console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); } pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='section_meeting_changes' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ if\(r.rows.length===0\) { console.log\('TABLE DOES NOT EXIST'\); } else { console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); } pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\('TABLE NOT FOUND: '+e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN \('section_meetings','grades','attendance','attendance_warnings','course_materials','course_messages','office_hour_bookings'\) ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ let cur=''; r.rows.forEach\(c=>{ if\(c.table_name!==cur\){cur=c.table_name;console.log\('\\\\n['+cur+']'\);} console.log\('  '+c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\); }\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name IN \('course_materials','course_messages','office_hour_bookings'\) ORDER BY table_name\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\('Existing tables:', r.rows.map\(x=>x.table_name\).join\(', '\)||'NONE'\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' ORDER BY table_name\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.table_name\).join\('\\n'\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='professor_course_materials' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name+' \('+c.data_type+'\)'\).join\('\\n'\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); Promise.all\([pool.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='office_hour_bookings'\\"\), pool.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='course_messages'\\"\)]\).then\(\([a,b]\)=>{ console.log\('office_hour_bookings:', a.rows.length ? 'EXISTS' : 'MISSING'\); console.log\('course_messages:', b.rows.length ? 'EXISTS' : 'MISSING'\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {pool} = require\('./config/db'\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name IN \('section_messages','professor_material_access_logs'\) ORDER BY table_name\\"\).then\(r=>{ console.log\(r.rows.length ? r.rows.map\(x=>x.table_name\).join\(', '\) : 'NONE EXIST'\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
